name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state

Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
      /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkTaken(i, p) == forks[i] = p

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
        /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
        /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ ForkTaken(LEFT(i), i)
        /\ ForkTaken(RIGHT(i), i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkTaken(LEFT(i), i)
        /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
        /\ ForkTaken(RIGHT(i), i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkTaken(LEFT(i), i)
        /\ ForkTaken(RIGHT(i), i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag



Init == 
  /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ flag[i] := TRUE
    /\ num[i] := 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})
    /\ flag[i] := FALSE
    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => 
        \E k \in 1..N : k # i /\ 
          (num[j] < num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j < i))
    /\ num[i] := 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm + 1}
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \E i \in 1..N:
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon + 1
        /\ \E i \in 1..N:
            /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
            /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
            /\ epsilon' = epsilon

Avg == (1/N) * \Sum i \in 1..N: clocks[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == /\ turn' \in {0,1}
        /\ wants' \in {0,1}^2
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 1 ELSE wants[i]]
        /\ turn' = 1 - turn
        /\ wants' = [i \in {0,1} |-> IF i = turn THEN 0 ELSE wants[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
